message:
feat(core): add cooldown_tracker module for time-based deduplication with expiry

Addresses the forever-suppression gap in pattern dedup (repro_dedup_bug.rs).
Provides CooldownTracker<K> with configurable expiry, eviction, and stats.
31 inline tests + 30 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
